basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released the official Project Technical Support Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a Graduate degree in Social Work, a Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject/field, 12th (Science) with a Diploma, or 10th with a Diploma can apply online on or before 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in social worker discipline OR PG in relevant subject/ field OR 12th in Science + Diploma OR 10th + Diploma
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Graduate degree in social worker discipline from a recognized university + three years of experience OR PG in relevant subject/field (public health/MSW). Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and data management software (Epicollect/REDCap). Project Technical Support II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering or equivalent) + Five (5) years' experience in relevant public health OR Three-year's graduate degree in relevant subject + Two years' experience in community health. Project Technical Support I: 10th + Diploma(MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent)+two year's experience in relevant subject/field OR Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject/field-one year experience in relevant subject.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Graduate degree in social worker discipline OR PG in relevant subject/ field OR 12th in Science + Diploma OR 10th + Diploma

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Technical Support III: Graduate degree in social worker discipline from a recognized university + three years of experience OR PG in relevant subject/field (public health/MSW). Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and data management software (Epicollect/REDCap). Project Technical Support II: 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering or equivalent) + Five (5) years' experience in relevant public health OR Three-year's graduate degree in relevant subject + Two years' experience in community health. Project Technical Support I: 10th + Diploma(MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent)+two year's experience in relevant subject/field OR Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject/field-one year experience in relevant subject.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support posts is 28th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Project Technical Support posts released by AIIMS Delhi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Technical Support - I?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support - I, the minimum qualification is 10th pass with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT/IT or equivalent) and two years of experience, or a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject with one year of experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Technical Support posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support posts will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Project Technical Support - III?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Technical Support - III posts is Rs. 28,000/- per month plus HRA, as admissible.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates from all over India who meet the eligibility criteria can apply.

faq.question: Q9. Are these posts contractual or permanent?
faq.answer: These Project Technical Support posts are contractual in nature, as indicated in the job type.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can download it from there.
